en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 3

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 3
Top Question of the Week
Why did you write the RTFKT Rugpull article?

NFTs have created new opportunities for creators, artists, designers globally. One of the biggest innovations of this new technology and subsequent market is the removal of the middleman. Creators can directly distribute to their buyers, users, consumers, fans without having to be subject to intermediaries.
However, with that said, this does not mean that the standard of quality, work or commitment to a buyer should ever be compromised. As a platform enabling creators, DIGITALAX upholds this standard.

Unfortunately, in the case of the RTFKT MetaJacket drop, the standard was cast aside in favor of expediency, with a clear lack of care and respect to the buyers. This was made apparent through communication or more like, utter disregard and lack thereof.

All efforts to give the team the benefit of the doubt were worn thin after over 6 weeks of non-responsiveness, leaving no choice but to interpret their actions as disingenuous from the start. Their reactions to the post sadly reinforce this interpretation. Rather than simply prioritising what happened, there was new deflection to Decentraland and also a stark contrast between their messages in public vs private in reaction to the post.
As a platform, upholding the integrity of delivery for the buyers, we are just glad that something is finally happening now that it has been brought into the light.
Most Common Repeat Questions
What is coming up for PODE?

Faberlare game release with Imagined Studios, Fashionistas NFT private and public drop and a bigger announcement about what it means to build the web3 version of Steam x Itch.io for the metaverse (i.e. Player Creator Portal). Within this bigger announcement we will also be describing an exit plan for those where the fit is not correct and a new entry plan for those that understand what this is and strongly would like to be a part of it.
Top Controversies in the Industry
Paris Hilton dropped a collaborative NFT series on Nifty Gateway. There was a lot of divided voices on Twitter for and against this, particularly questions around;
Whether quality of Art matters?
Are a small number of buyers painting the tape and making the market?
Is the NFT market turning back into the old creator hierarchies?
Silly Fails and Trolling
This is more of a silly win… April 20th (Tomorrow) just might become the first international Doge day….
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
Join our Community!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 3

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 3
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
ليه did you write ال RTFKT Rugpull article?

NFTs have created جديد opportunities لـ creators, artists, designers globally. One من ال biggest innovations من this جديد technology و subsequent market is ال removal من ال middleman. Creators can directly distribute الى their buyers, users, consumers, fans without having الى be subject الى intermediaries.
However, مع that said, this does not mean that ال standard من quality, work or commitment الى a buyer should ever be compromised. As a platform enabling creators, DIGITALAX upholds this standard.

Unfortunately, في ال case من ال RTFKT MetaJacket drop, ال standard was cast aside في favor من expediency, مع a clear lack من care و respect الى ال buyers. This was made apparent through communication or more like, utter disregard و lack thereof.

All efforts الى give ال team ال benefit من ال doubt were worn thin after over 6 weeks من non-responsiveness, leaving no choice but الى interpret their actions as disingenuous من ال start. Their reactions الى ال بوست sadly reinforce this interpretation. Rather than simply prioritising what happened, there was جديد deflection الى Decentraland و also a stark contrast between their messages في public vs private في reaction الى ال بوست.
As a platform, upholding ال integrity من delivery لـ ال buyers, we are just glad that something is finally happening now that it has been brought into ال light.
Most الاسئلة المتكررة
What is coming up لـ PODE?

Faberlare game release مع Imagined Studios, Fashionistas NFT private و public drop و a bigger announcement about what it means الى build ال web3 version من Steam x Itch.io لـ ال metaverse (i.e. Player Creator Portal). Within this bigger announcement we will also be describing an exit plan لـ those where ال fit is not correct و a جديد entry plan لـ those that understand what this is و strongly would like الى be a part من it.
Top Controversies في ال Industry
Paris Hilton dropped a collaborative NFT series على Nifty Gateway. There was a lot من divided voices على Twitter لـ و against this, particularly اسئلة around;
Whether quality من Art matters?
Are a small number من buyers painting ال tape و making ال market?
Is ال NFT market turning back into ال old creator hierarchies?
Silly Fails و Trolling
This is more من a silly win… April 20th (Tomorrow) just might become ال first international Doge day….
If you would like a سؤال answered or contribute content الى next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server في #FUD-FAQ channel!
